e6f9dc3b346d.title: AI Judge incorrectly flags 'passed-empty' and '0 cards produced' as functional bugs in cold-run tests
e6f9dc3b346d.expected: AI judge should interpret 'passed-empty' and '0 cards produced' as expected behavior (informational/non-issue) under cold-run conditions as defined by test context.
e6f9dc3b346d.actual: AI judge flags 'passed-empty' and '0 cards produced' as high-priority functional bugs, leading to over-flagging and wasted engineering effort.
e6f9dc3b346d.evidence:
Surfaced by the LLM Council peer-review (a blind spot the single judges missed):
Chairman verdict explicitly states these are 'expected artifacts of this setup, not product bugs' and that 'The AI judge's flags are over-flagged noise and constitute a bug in the automated testing framework itself.'

5fe1b78a67a5.title: Semantic subagents skipped — no AI provider configured
5fe1b78a67a5.expected: With GEMINI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set, the AI judges run
5fe1b78a67a5.actual: No LLM provider is configured in this environment
5fe1b78a67a5.evidence: Set GEMINI_API_KEY (or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) so the semantic testers can evaluate output correctness and UX.

1623e36e552d.title: Configure step has no club_filter select (graceful — input not drivable)
1623e36e552d.expected: A <select name=club_filter> of parsed clubs (or a clear 'no clubs found' state)
1623e36e552d.actual: Select not present (parsing found no clubs for this file) — app responded gracefully (HTTP 2xx, no crash)

ee03ff2dd60f.title: Upload of 'ARENA Manchester International' meet file resulted in zero content cards
ee03ff2dd60f.expected: Successful processing of a meet file to generate relevant content cards.
ee03ff2dd60f.actual: The content summary indicates 0 cards were generated despite the meet name being provided.
repro: Reproduce the flow (result: passed-empty) and inspect the functional aspect described above

22cedc9ab58e.title: Successful upload but no content generated
22cedc9ab58e.expected: A 'passed' flow result should indicate successful content generation if an input file was provided and processed.
22cedc9ab58e.actual: The flow_result is 'passed-empty', and the content_summary confirms 'No content cards were generated'.
22cedc9ab58e.evidence:
AI judge (functional, confidence high):
flow_result: passed-empty; content_summary: 'No content cards were generated.'

[council triage] demoted — Expected behavior for cold run based on test context; AI judge is over-flagging.
repro: Reproduce the flow (result: passed-empty) and inspect the functional aspect described above
